name: templateId
label: Excel Template
help: Select an Excel template from your Renderbase account

name: variables
label: Template Variables
help: Key-value pairs for template variables. Use the variable names defined in your template.

name: fileName
label: File Name
help: Custom file name without the .xlsx extension. Defaults to the template name if not provided.

name: waitForCompletion
label: Wait for Completion
help: If enabled, the module waits until the Excel file is fully generated. Disable for async processing.
